title: Rent Payment Assistance * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Rent Payment Assistance * Older Adults 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Disaster/Emergency Issues Domestic Violence Issues Domestic Violence Issues * African American Community Domestic Violence Issues * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Families with Children Hispanic/Latino Community Homeless Veterans Homelessness Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals Medicaid Recipients Mental Health Issues Older Adults Pregnant Individuals Sexual Assault Issues Slavic Community Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NORTHWEST PILOT PROJECT RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides eviction prevention (includes rental assistance if future income can be verified and subject to availability), relocation, and deposit assistance for older adults. Assistance is limited due to the availability of funding and is not guaranteed. Households can receive assistance once every two years. 1430 SW Broadway Suite 200 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: -Household must contain one member at least 55 years old -Household must reside in Multnomah County or be homeless -Household must not contain any minor children under 18 years old -Household not currently in subsidized or Section 8 housing -Household must have a plan for resuming rent payments and not owe more than 2 months of past due rent -Household must meet income requirements; priority for those making 20% Median Family Income (MFI) or below Focus is on serving older adults with health concerns or disabilities or who have very low income, language barriers, no support system, or other barriers to housing Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 227-5605 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALVATION ARMY JACKSON COUNTY SALVATION ARMY SOCIAL SERVICES ASSISTANCE FOR OLDER ADULTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with rent, utilities, water, and prescriptions as funding is available. May also assist with transportation needs. 922 N Central Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 65 and older Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm (541) 773-6965 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST PILOT PROJECT RENTAL ASSISTANCE SALVATION ARMY JACKSON COUNTY ASSISTANCE FOR OLDER ADULTS
